endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/checkNamespaceAvailability
endpoints.description: Checks the availability of the given service namespace across all Windows Azure subscriptions. This is useful because the domain name is created based on the service namespace name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces
endpoints.description: Lists all the available namespaces within the subscription irrespective of the resourceGroups.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces
endpoints.description: Lists the available namespaces within a resourceGroup.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Returns the description for the specified namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Creates/Updates a service namespace. Once created, this namespace's resource manifest is immutable. This operation is idempotent.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.NotificationHubs/namespaces/{namespaceName}
endpoints.description: Deletes an existing namespace. This operation also removes all associated notificationHubs under the namespace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{NAMESPACENAME}} with a real namespacename.

endpoints.name: GET /{operationStatusLink}
endpoints.description: The Get Operation Status operation returns the status of the specified operation. After calling an asynchronous operation, you can call Get Operation Status to determine whether the operation has succeeded, failed, or is still in progress.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{OPERATIONSTATUSLINK}} with a real operationstatuslink.
